title: schizachyrium scoparium var. littorale
intro: Schizachyrium scoparium var. littorale, also known as little bluestem, is a variant of the Schizachyrium scoparium plant, a perennial grass native to North America. The medicinal properties of Schizachyrium scoparium var. littorale have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body and mind. Schizachyrium scoparium var. littorale can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal tea infusions or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
